title: 4 x 7M Rolls Of Christmas Wrapping Paper - Cute Kids Designs - Festive Wrap - Red Cute Characters, Blue Santa, Red Gingerbread, White Santa - Complete With 32 Matching Tags
features: Set Of 4 Cute Christmas Gift Wrap. 7M x 70cm with 32 Matching Gift tags.

CHARMING GIFT WRAPPING - Make your Christmas gifts look irresistibly charming with this set of 4 cute design Christmas gift wrap rolls, each featuring an adorable festive pattern. This pack includes 4 rolls of assorted wrapping paper, each measuring 7 meters in length and 70 cm in width, providing ample coverage for wrapping all sizes of gifts. Parcel ribbon not included. For illustration purposes only.

CUTE DESIGNS - The set features a variety of cute Christmas patterns enhancing the appearance of your gifts with sleek and stylish designs. Red Gingerbread Man Design. A warm, festive red background sprinkled with cute gingerbread men, candy, and more festive bakes. Red Christmas Characters Design. A vibrant red roll filled with adorable festive characters such as smiling Santas, friendly reindeer, cheerful snowmen and penguins. Blue Santa Design. A crisp sky blue background featuring cute, rounded Santa illustrations, snowy accents and winter motifs. White Santa Design. A clean, crisp white background decorated with playful Santa characters in bright festive colours.

GREAT COVERAGE - Each roll measures 7 meters (length) x 70 cm (width) approximately, providing enough paper to wrap multiple gifts of various sizes. Suitable for wrapping large presents as well as smaller ones. At 7 metres long, each roll gives you plenty of paper for several presents, ensuring no last minute shortages when wrapping. The 70cm width makes it wide enough for larger items yet manageable for smaller packages, giving you versatility without waste.

MATCHING TAGS - Also included, is a pack of 32 gift tags. Matching tags enhance the overall aesthetic of your wrapped gifts designed to bring joy and convenience to your gift wrapping. Each coordinated tag comes complete with a thread for easy attachment to your presents. This set makes an excellent choice for a beautifully coordinated and festive holiday season.

FULLY RECYCLABLE - Our paper is also fully recyclable too! Helping you to do your part in being more ecofriendly all year round. The paper is shipped in a custom made double walled sturdy postal box which adds extra protection to prevent damaged rolls during transit. Ensuring safe arrival of your paper and tags!
description: Product Description Set Of 4 Cute Christmas Gift Wrap. 7M x 70cm With 32 Matching Gift tags. Make your Christmas gifts look irresistibly charming with this set of 4 cute design Christmas gift wrap rolls, each featuring an adorable festive pattern. Each roll measures 7 meters in length and 70 cm in width, providing ample coverage for all your gift-wrapping needs. Complete with 32 matching gift tags with thread, this set ensures your presents look beautifully coordinated and festive. Each coordinated tag comes complete with a red thread for easy attachment to your presents. The set features a variety of cute Christmas patterns enhancing the appearance of your gifts with adorable, stylish designs. With four assorted rolls, offering different patterns to suit various tastes and gift recipients make each gift unique and exciting. Red Cute Characters A vibrant red roll filled with adorable festive characters such as smiling Santas, friendly reindeer, cheerful snowmen and penguins. Includes snowflakes and colourful accents for a lively, busy, fun-filled pattern. Designed to delight younger recipients and add instant joy to any gift. White Santa Clause A clean, crisp white background decorated with playful Santa characters in bright festive colours. Accented with stats, presents and a Merry Christmas script, this design offers a modern, fresh look while keeping the cute Christmas charm. Red Gingerbread A warm, festive red background sprinkled with cute gingerbread men, candy, and more festive bakes. This design is perfect for sweet-themed gifts, children, and anyone who loves a traditional gingerbread look with a fun, cartoon twist. Blue Santa Scenes A crisp sky blue background featuring cute, rounded Santa illustrations, snowy accents and winter motifs. The blue tone gives this design a cool, cosy feel perfect for wrapping presents with a magical winter wonderland theme. Each roll measures 7 meters (length) x 70 cm (width) approximately, providing enough paper to wrap multiple gifts of various sizes. Suitable for wrapping large presents as well as smaller ones. At 7 metres long, each roll gives you plenty of paper for several presents, ensuring no last minute shortages when wrapping. The 70cm width makes it wide enough for larger items yet manageable for smaller packages, giving you versatility without waste. The paper is shipped in a custom made double walled sturdy postal box which adds extra protection to prevent damaged rolls during transit. Ensuring safe arrival of your paper and tags!
